titleStmt.title: SII 24.93: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 93. (A.R. No. 108 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the sale 4 vēli of fallow land made tax-free and belonging to the temple in Viḷattūrnāḍu in Rājamahēndra-vaḷanāḍu by the Śrīvaishṇavavāriyam to Kaḍuvaṅguḍaiyāṉ Ādittaṉ Tiruvaraṅgadēvaṉ alias Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara Vijayapālaṉ stipulating payment of 32 kalam of paddy at the rate of 8 kalam per vēli to the temple for 220 diramam which was utilised towards a jewel to the god in the name of Paṉaiyūruḍaiyāṉ Vaḷavaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ. The transaction was made on Tuesday, the 352nd day in the month of Āṉi in the 41st year of the king's reign when the nakshatra was Rōhiṇī. The details of date probably correspond to A.D. 1111, June 6, Tuesday; ·63. (Same as No. 91 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavu n=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakkoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayil tuṇaik kon=taḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḻvali kāṭṭip poṟp pari naṭātti kīrttiyai ṉiṟutti vaṭaticai vākai
cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilap pāvaiyun=tanimaiyun=tavira vantu punitaṟ tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi yiraṇṭun=taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila vaḷākam Eṅ
kaṇun tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūpālar tiṟaiviṭutan=ta katañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai ( karun=talai) paruntalaittiṭat tan ponnakaṟ puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulappiṟai pol niṟpiḻai Ennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu
tan kai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattirai yaḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tanmānamum kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Ēṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭai n=toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait tannāḷukantu tānun tāṉaiyum pan
nāḷiṭṭap palapala mutukum payantetir māṟina jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻiñ celviyum vāḷariroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaik koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭa
laṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum poruparittalaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy van=tu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñ ceṉaiyai yevip pañcavarai(y)varum poruta Amaṟkkaḷattañci veruneḷit toṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉaca rar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟ
ṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastampan ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiṭ potiyilum matta veṅkaripaṭu meyyaccaiyyamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kaṭalmalaināṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tani vicumpeṟa māve ṟiya tan varutanit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi poṅ
(poṅ)koḷiyāramum tiruppuyat talaṅkaḷum pola vīramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārtoḻac civaniṭattumaiyena tina cintāmaṇi Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Ava ḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruntena maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicaivallavi Ēḻulaka(ḻulaka)muṭai yāḷ vāḻi malarn tinin=tiruppa Ūḻiyum Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vi nmarāna tiripuvana cakkaravattikaḷ
śrīkulottuṅ(k)(o)coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 1 Āvatu pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār kanmikaḷom śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa pārttiven=tirap brahmādhirājar Evalpaṭi śrīveyiṣṇavavāriyam Arumārit tirukkarakaṇṭarum Iṭavai nārāyaṇa nampiyum parakesaritatirunāṭuṭaiyā nampiyum tiruviṇṇaka ṇa nampiyum śrī(ri)pātadāsarum
periyakoyiṟ piriyarum perumpuliyūr tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyā nampiyum tiruveṅkaṭap piccarum tiruccaṅkaṇituṟaivanum tiruvaraṅkappiccarum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷappiccarum nālūrt tirunāṭuṭaiyā nampiyum Āritanārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutu Āritan kecavan taniyiḷañciṅkamum ṟivariyānum kāśyapan ciṅ
kan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum koyiṟkaṇakku Araiyanampalak kūttanāna nānūṟṟup piriyanum śrīvaiyiṣṇavak kaṇakku Ārāvamutu vilviyāna śrīvaiyi[ṣṇa ] Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Irājasun=tarivaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu kaṭuvaṅkuṭi kaṭuvaṅkuṭaiyān Ātittan tiruvaraṅkatevanāna virutarāja viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu
Irājamahentravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūrnāṭṭu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷiye ṭantu maṇaliṭāyp payir ceyya Uṇṇātu kiṭanta van viḻup paraiyar Āḻvārkku kastūri cāttiya kaikke viḷākamākka nilaṅ koṇṭu tiruttik kalveṭṭukaikku śrīvaiyiṣṇavan ṭaiyāruyya vantārum koṇ
ṭu vantu tiruvaraṅkattu Aṭaippumutali Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikan pakkal la nila vilaikkuk kkun tiramam Irupat vari caṭṭattukku tiramam 10 3gha mumākat tiramam 3 10 2 muppat tiraṇṭu Ittiramam nūṟṟeṇpatteṭṭu miṭṭu Ivviḷākattil Ippu ttin kuḻi Aññūṟṟiṉāl nāla
m kāl nīkki maṇaliṭāyum kuṭṭamāyum tiṭalāyum kiṭanta nilam munṟe velikkum Ippu kan nilaṅ v varicaikku śrīpaṇṭā paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl Aḷakkak kaṭava nel muppattiru kalattināl Ūrkālākki ne kum pokam potāmaiyi
ivvaḷavan viḻupparaiyar kāka ruttanampi puṇṭarikan Iṭṭivittu varukaiyilum Innilaṅ koṇṭa Ippa ḻan pakkal Innilattu nilam nārpattonṟāvatu varaiyaḷavuñ cella Innilaṅka po tu kiṭantamaiyālum
kastūri cāttiyaruḷa kaṇṭu kastūri cātti varukai yālum Innilam kaṭuAbove the line.vaṅkuṭaiyār varaṅkateva nārāna virutarāja payaṅkara vicaiyyapālaṟku ti nāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ puṟam yeḻuntaruḷi Ekātacit tirumañcanam pukkaruḷi mukkal variciyāl perun tiruvamutu ce
ytaruḷi tiruvaraṅkateva ruḷiyiruntu tūṇiyariciyāAbove the line.l Appam Amutu ceytaruḷukaikkum tiruvaraṅkatevanennum viḷākamākak kaik koṇṭu Ipaṇapākan tiruttina ni m tiruttātu pāḻukiṭan=ta nilam munṟemukkāl li Āka nilam nālu veliyum kaikkoṇṭu tiruvaraṅkattaṭaippu
mutavi puṇṭarikan pakkal [ pramāṇa] vilaikkum kalveṭṭavum nilantiruttavum paṉai yūruṭaiyār vaḷavan viḻupparaiyan kuṭutta tiramam Irunūṟṟirupatukkum talaimāṟu periya koyilil śrīvaiyiṣṇavarāl parakesarittirunāma muṭaiya nampiyum tiru viṇṇakar nampiyum śrībharatadāsarum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷappiriyarum kantāṭait tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanampi
yum śrīpuṇṭarikanum Uḷḷiṭṭavarum nāṟpattonṟāvatu Āni maāsattu nāḷ mun nūṟṟaimpattiraṇṭu peṟṟa cevvākkiḻamaiyum rocaṇiyum Ivvirutarājabhayaṅkara vijaiyapālan Innilattukku Āparaṇa vilaikkum Innilan tiruttina tiramattukkutta talaimāṟum Oṭukkina tiramam Irunūṟṟirupatum Ittiramam Iru
nūṟṟirupatum Oṭukki paṉaiyūruṭaiyān vaḷavan viḻupparaiyar perāl Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruvaṭimalaṟku śrīpātacālam ceytuvittu kaikku ponta koḷḷa tiramam Irunūṟṟirupatum koṇṭu Innilam nālu veliyum Ittiruppaṇikku Uṭalāka viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai kāraikkuṭikki yellait
(t)tiṭalāna nārāyaṇa viḷākattukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai maṇaṟkuṭi nilattukkum kāraikkuṭit tiṟappu nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai kūṭalūr nilattukkum peruvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kkulaikku teṟku Ivvicainta perunāṅkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam periyatirukkopurattuk kiḻai kolāl
nūṟu kuḻi koṇṭatu Oru māvāka van=tanilam nālveliyum tiruttaṟat tirutti veli Oṉṟukku puncey varicaikku paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl śrīpaṇṭāratte Aḷakku nel Eṇkalamāka nilam nālvelikkum Aḷakku nel muppattiru kalamum Aḷakka Innilattil mikuti koṇṭu tirumañcanat tukkum peruttiruvamutukkum Appavamutukkum Uṭalāka koṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatā
kak koyilile kal veṭṭuvittukkoḷḷap peṟuvārākavum Innilattukkulai kurampu cennir veṭṭi tirunāḷ kuṭimai maṟṟum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai Epper paṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭavārallātārākavum Ipparicu Icaintu Innilam nāl veliyum Ikkaṭuvankuṭaiyār Āticcan tiruvaraṅkatevanārāna virutarājabhayaṅkara vijaiya pālaṟku Ittiramam Irunūṟṟirupatum tiruvāparaṇattukku Uṭa
lāka (laka)k koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ittiruvaraṅkatevaviḷākam nālveliyum candrātittavarai niṟka Ivvirutarājabhayaṅkara vicaiyapālaṟku viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ivvāḻvār kanmikaḷom Āḻvārkoyiṟ kaṇakku Araiyanampalak kūttanāna nānūṟṟuvappiriyannen Ivai yenneḻuttu śrīvaiyiṣṇavakkaṇakku Ārāvamutu villiyāna śrīvaiyiṣṇa
vappiriyan Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku kantāṭai tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ip ppukait tiruvaraṅka māḷi Eḻuttu Ippa Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruviḷā laiya tiruvaraṅkap piriyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
parakecaritterin=ta tirunāṭuṭaiyānampi Eḻuttu ñaiyātanamaikku śrīkāri māṟaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan taniyiḷañ ciṅkam Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai perumpuliyūr tiru vāykkulamuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ippa namaikku Ivai navamātevi Araici neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan cirākava
n periyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruccittirakūṭamalaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ttirukku śrīvi nampiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku nāḷūr tirunāṭuṭaiyā nampiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Itu ḷuyātan Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷak koneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruccaṅkaṉituṟai U
ṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ittanmam patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrīvaiyiṣṇava[rakṣai] .
Digital edition of SII 24.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
